code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut stop = false
  while i < n
    if not stop
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          if total + cur > 100
            stop = true
          else
            total = total + cur
          end
          cur = 0
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not stop
    if in_num
      if total + cur <= 100
        total = total + cur
      end
    end
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
